# Triage policy (judgment-first)

The skill performs **judgment-first review**, not score-first automation.

## Rules

1. Broad fetch first from arXiv, bioRxiv, PubMed.
2. Browser inspection depth is adaptive (metadata → abstract → HTML → PDF only when justified).
3. Final decisions must cite evidence URLs and explicit rationale.
4. Maintain shortlist quality; do not inflate counts to meet a target.

## Selection priorities

- Direct taxonomy/biodiversity/species/insect relevance
- Credible AI transfer value for taxonomy workflows
- Strong methods + practical feasibility

## Constraints

- Recommended set <= 5
- Shortlist <= 8
- Deep reads <= 3
